description: Labeled (voice, candidate) pairs for the Voice Match Score eval. Each pair has a human-assigned voice-fidelity rating (0-100): how well the candidate text reads in the reference user's authentic voice. Embeddings are synthesized deterministically by evals/voice-match/synthetic-embedder.ts so the eval is reproducible offline (no Voyage/OpenAI API call) while still exercising the real cosine+feature blend. Spearman target: >= 0.7.

referenceTexts.directBuilder: I shipped systems. Built scrappy tools fast. Took ownership end to end. Measured everything. Kept the rigor high and the talk pragmatic.
referenceTexts.warmCollaborator: I love building with great people. We learned together and supported each other. I'm grateful for the team that mentored me and grew with me.
